implBasis: @radix-ui/react-checkbox + cva + SelectionItem/BooleanValueIcon (keyboard delegated to Radix; spec:355 correctly points to Radix docs, no specific keymap overclaim)

falseClaims.宣稱: A11y Focus: 『鍵盤聚焦時顯示 visible ring(focus-visible:ring-2 ring-ring ring-offset-1 per design-system focus-visible canonical)』— 泛指整個 Checkbox 控件
falseClaims.真實code行為: 主 cva(checkbox.tsx:26)確為 `ring-2 ring-ring ring-offset-1`,但 readonly-in-Field 分支(checkbox.tsx:247)的 focus ring 為 `ring-2 ring-ring`(無 ring-offset-1)。A11y 段之 blanket 敘述未涵蓋此 readonly 分支的 offset 缺省
